pr.title: Add Zapier Benchmarks to Model Ranking leaderboard list
pr.body:
Adds Zapier Benchmarks to the Model Ranking section of the leaderboard directory. Zapier Benchmarks evaluates AI models on real-world business automation tasks across multiple domains.

**Changes:**
- Added Zapier Benchmarks entry to the Comprehensive subsection of Model Ranking
- Entry positioned alphabetically after Yupp Leaderboard
- Includes link to https://zapier.com/benchmarks and description of benchmark focus
pr.author: Copilot
